description: island in Nassau County, Florida, United States
description_wiki: Amelia Island is a part of the Sea Islands chain that stretches along the East Coast of the United States from South Carolina to Florida; it is the southernmost of the Sea Islands, and the northernmost of the barrier islands on Florida's Atlantic coast.

description: maritime service branch of the British Armed Forces
description_wiki: The Royal Navy (RN) is the naval warfare force of the United Kingdom, responsible for defending the UK, the Crown Dependencies, and the Overseas Territories from naval attack or invasion.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: colonial empire governed by Spain between 1492 and 1976
description_wiki: The Spanish Empire, sometimes referred to as the Hispanic Monarchy or the Catholic Monarchy, was a colonial empire that existed between 1492 and 1976.

description: largest city in the U.S. state of South Carolina
description_wiki: Charleston is the most populous city in the U.S. state of South Carolina.

description: 1775–1783 war between Great Britain and the Thirteen Colonies, which won independence as the United States of America
description_wiki: The American Revolutionary War (April 19, 1775 – September 3, 1783), also known as the Revolutionary War or American War of Independence, was the armed conflict that comprised the final eight years of the broader American Revolution, in which American Patriot forces organized as the Continental Army and commanded by George Washington defeated the British Army.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: South Carolina (  KARR-ə-LY-nə) is a state in the Southeastern, South Atlantic and Deep South regions of the United States.

description_wiki: Darien () is a city in and the county seat of McIntosh County, Georgia, United States.

city in Nassau County, Florida, United States
description_wiki: Fernandina Beach is a city in and the county seat of Nassau County, Florida, United States, in the state's northeastern corner.

island in Camden County, Georgia, United States
description_wiki: Cumberland Island, in the southeastern United States, is the largest of the Sea Islands of Georgia.

description: city in Duval County, and largest city in State of Florida, United States
description_wiki: Jacksonville (US:  , JAK-sən-vil; colloquially nicknamed Jax) is the most populous city proper in the U.S. state of Florida, located on the Atlantic coast of northeastern Florida.

description: army of the Confederate States
description_wiki: The Confederate States Army (CSA), also called the Confederate army or the Southern army, was the military land force of the Confederate States of America (commonly referred to as the Confederacy) during the American Civil War (1861–1865), fighting against the United States (also known as Union) forces to support the rebellion of the Southern states and uphold and expand the institution of slavery.

description: 1861–1865 civil war in the United States between the North and the South over the enslavement of African-Americans
description_wiki: The American Civil War (April 12, 1861 – May 26, 1865; also known by other names) was a civil war in the United States between the Union ("the North") and the Confederacy ("the South"), which was formed in 1861 by states that had seceded from the Union to preserve slavery in the United States, which they saw as threatened because of the election of Abraham Lincoln and the growing abolitionist movement in the North.

description: county in Florida, United States
description_wiki: Duval County ( dew-VAWL), officially the City of Jacksonville and Duval County, is a county in the northeastern part of the U.S. state of Florida.
